---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for GoEazy
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.
Ex: "As a tenant, I'm frustrated when I can't compare two properties side by side..."

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you'd like this feature to work.

## Alternative Solutions
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## UI/UX Mockup (Optional)
If you have a visual idea, add wireframes, mockups, or screenshots of similar features from other apps.

## Implementation Notes (Optional)
If you have technical insight, describe how this could be implemented.
- Components affected:
- New dependencies needed:
- Database changes:

## Additional Context
Any other context, screenshots, or references.
